# Quadratic equation definition

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equation definition: An equation is not quadratic if it is missing the x2 term (meaning a = 0). Map connection: this idea links by common_mistake_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

## Misconceptions
- An equation is not quadratic if it is missing the x2 term (meaning a = 0).
